data.title: Agero Enters into Agreement to Acquire Urgently, for $5.50 in Cash Per Share, Expanding Tech-Driven Roadside Assistance Across Automotive, Fleet, Rental, and Insurance Markets
data.description: The merger of Urgently and Agero brings together their cutting-edge technology and extensive reach to improve services for automakers, insurers, and mobility and service providers. This acquisition leverages the strengths of both companies, creating a powerful force in the industry. The increased scale and technological advancements will significantly enhance the experiences of clients. This strategic move is set to revolutionize the sector, offering new possibilities for growth and innovation to all stakeholders involved.

data.title: Circle stock surges in the face of market downturn as stablecoins penetrate finance. Canaan ups BTC reserves; Wells Fargo eyes crypto ops.
data.description: The stock of the USDC issuer is experiencing a significant increase even in the midst of a market downturn, showcasing the growth of stablecoins within traditional finance. Additionally, Canaan has made a move to increase their Bitcoin reserves, while Wells Fargo is considering entering the cryptocurrency services sector. These developments reflect a growing trend towards digital assets, with the USDC issuer's stock showing notable gains despite market challenges.

data.title: Teekay Group Announces Availability of Annual Reports on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Hamilton, Bermuda, March 13, 2026 - Teekay Corporation Ltd. (NYSE: TK) and Teekay Tankers Ltd. (NYSE: TNK), collectively known as the Teekay Group, have made public their Annual Reports on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. These reports have been officially submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and are available for viewing on the website www.teekay.com. The reports can be accessed in the "Investors" section under "Financials and Presentations" for each specific entity.

data.title: Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology Announces the Company’s Receipt of Nasdaq Delisting Notice Subject to Hearing
data.description: Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology, a company listed on NASDAQ as BHAT, revealed on March 13, 2026, that it had been served a letter by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on March 9, 2026. This letter pointed out that the Company was not aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A)(iii), referred to as the Low Priced Stocks Rule. The violation was due to the Company's securities maintaining a closing bid price of $0.10 or less for ten consecutive trading days, from February 23, 2026, to March 6, 2026. Consequently, Nasdaq decided to delist the Company’s ordinary shares from The Nasdaq Capital Market.

data.title: SalMar - Conversion of development licenses to ordinary licenses
data.description: SalMar ASA has been informed by the Norwegian Directorate of Fisheries about the conversion of development licenses, totaling 6,112 tonnes of maximum allowable biomass (MAB), into regular aquaculture licenses for the Arctic Offshore Farming project. This conversion allows these licenses to contribute to the Group’s standard production capacity. SalMar sees this development favorably, indicating that the authorities acknowledge the fulfillment of license allocation criteria. The decision is a validation of SalMar's substantial investments and expertise in offshore aquaculture.

data.title: Palladyne AI Announces Employee Equity Awards
data.description: Palladyne AI Corp., a prominent US defense and industrial technology firm, revealed that on March 10, 2026, the Compensation Committee of Palladyne AI’s Board of Directors sanctioned the issuance of 107,932 restricted stock units (RSUs) to seven new employees. These RSUs serve as substantial incentives for the aforementioned employees who are joining the company.

data.title: Bitcoin Buyers Should Be 'Ecstatic' About $70,000, Ric Edelman Says
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is currently hovering around $70,000 as financial expert Rick Edelman believes investors should be excited about this price point. He compares the current value to the peak price of $126,000, suggesting that the lower price presents an even better opportunity. Edelman recommends allocating 10-40% of portfolios to cryptocurrencies, emphasizing the potential for Bitcoin to outperform any other asset class in the next 5-10 years. Despite trading over 30% below its previous peak, Edelman is optimistic about the growing adoption of Bitcoin and expects significant returns, estimating a 5x-10x increase in value over the next decade.

data.title: Oatly Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, on March 13, 2026, Oatly Group AB (Nasdaq: OTLY), the leading oat drink company globally, disclosed filing its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Alarra T. Tozin as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Chicago on March 13, 2026, Alarra T. Tozin was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for her notable achievements in Strategic Digital Marketing Innovation. Tozin has established a successful career through her contributions to the industry.

data.title: Data source change results in lower inflation, surprising economists with better figures, raising questions.
data.description: A revised methodology led to a higher-than-anticipated inflation report, sparking inquiries from several economists amidst the new findings.
